  • Classes in org.apache.axis2.deployment used by org.apache.axis2.corba.deployer
    Class
    Description
    AbstractDeployer
    AbstractDeployer class which can be extended by all Axis2 deployers
    Deployer
    This interface is used to provide the custom deployment mechanism , where you can write your own Deployer to process a particular type and make that to a service or a module.
    DeploymentConstants
    Constants used during service/module deployment.
    DeploymentException
     
  • Classes in org.apache.axis2.deployment used by org.apache.axis2.deployment
    Class
    Description
    AbstractDeployer
    AbstractDeployer class which can be extended by all Axis2 deployers
    AbstractServiceBuilderExtension
    The Class AbstractServiceBuilderExtension is abstract class that can be used to write new ServiceBuilderExtensions.
    Deployer
    This interface is used to provide the custom deployment mechanism , where you can write your own Deployer to process a particular type and make that to a service or a module.
    DeploymentConstants
    Constants used during service/module deployment.
    DeploymentEngine
     
    DeploymentException
     
    DescriptionBuilder
    This class does the common tasks for all *Builder class.
    ModuleDeployer
    Standard Axis2 Module Deployer which use module.xml file to deploy Modules.
    RepositoryListener
     
    ServiceBuilderExtension
    The interface ServiceBuilderExtension provides an extension point to org.apache.axis2.deployment.Deployer interface.
    ServiceDeployer
    Standard Axis2 service Deployer which use services.xml file to build services.
